creator: karl@denninger.net
text: I've put that (one-line) patch in and will see if I can trigger the panic again.  Since it happens to me on a production system and I've been unable to craft a test case that makes it happen repeatedly on my test machine it may be a material amount of time before I can say it's fixed, given that the usual time-to-fail here is a week if I do not take interventions to prevent it.
